affected_pattern: Customer reports seeing the same $ amount posted at the same timestamp on two line items under different SKUs
root_cause: Catalog SKU duplication — a catalog refresh introduced a shadow SKU that pointed to the same rating rule, causing the product catalog join to emit two rows per service, each charged separately.
supporting_evidence: Duplicate Charge RCA Playbook: Catalog Shadow-SKU pattern
Catalog table shows two SKUs with identical rating_rule_id
Catalog refresh ticket CAT-2031 introduced the shadow SKU 14 days ago
recommended_action: Deactivate the shadow SKU in the catalog
Reverse the duplicate SKU charges and consolidate to a single line item
Add a unique constraint (rating_rule_id) on the SKU table
Automate catalog refresh diff-review before publishing to production
